task_completion.description: Open the device registry or dive computer management window.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog or panel for managing dive computers, editing device names, or device registry is open in the dive log application.

task_completion.description: Locate the 'OSTC 3' dive computer in the registry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The device 'OSTC 3' (or 'Heinrichs Weikamp OSTC 3') is visible and selected or highlighted in the list of devices.

task_completion.description: Enter the new nickname 'Primary OSTC' for the target device.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Primary OSTC' is typed into the nickname or alias input field corresponding to the 'OSTC 3' device.

task_completion.description: Apply the changes in the device registry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'OK', 'Apply', or 'Save' within the device registry dialog to confirm the nickname change.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the main dive log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'File -> Save', clicks a save disk icon in the main application toolbar, or uses a save keyboard shortcut to save the overall dive log file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual dive log software GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a graphical dive log application (e.g., Subsurface) being used, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not edit the raw log file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening the dive log file (.xml or .ssrf) in a text editor like gedit, vim, or nano to manually change the XML tags.

integrity.description: The nickname was entered into the correct GUI field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Primary OSTC' is typed specifically into the device nickname/alias field, not pasted into a terminal, search bar, or unrelated text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target dive computer is 'OSTC 3', which may appear in the software's device registry as its full model name: 'Heinrichs Weikamp OSTC 3'. The expected nickname to be assigned is exactly 'Primary OSTC'.
